name: Fabric Bin Side Table Black Frame - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring a touch of modern charm to your decor with this Fabric Bin End Table from Room Essentials™. Supported by a metal frame, this square end table features a wooden tabletop and a lower shelf for convenient display space. It's also designed with a fabric drawer featuring a cutout to easily access stored items. Plus, the neutral tones of gray, natural wood and black allow for easy integration into any room's decor scheme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 12.59 inches
Overall Height: 23.50 inches
Overall Depth: 11.75 inches
Distance from shelf to bottom of drawer: 12.59 inches
Distance from floor to bottom of shelf : 4.21 inches
Distance between front legs: 12.6 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 9.50 inches
Depth of drawer: 10.43 inches
Width of drawer: 10.62 inches
Height of drawer: 5 inches
